title: Clean up code, list containers
body:
* Reformat project with black formatter/style + isort
* Rename `__ALL__` to `__all__`
* Implement list_containers() + unit tests

Fixes #21 

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
